native_policy_candidates.name: replace_or_insert_literal_gemspec_fields
native_policy_candidates.description: Replace existing literal field assignments or insert missing fields inside the Gem::Specification block.

native_policy_candidates.name: preserve_non_placeholder_summary_description
native_policy_candidates.description: Do not overwrite non-placeholder destination summary/description with placeholder template values.

native_policy_candidates.name: union_literal_dir_files_assignment
native_policy_candidates.description: Union literal string entries from template, destination, and merged spec.files Dir[...] assignments while preserving comments attached to entries.

native_policy_candidates.name: preserve_destination_nonliteral_files_assignment
native_policy_candidates.description: If destination spec.files uses helper code or nonliteral enumeration, preserve destination structure and only run compatible follow-up policies.
native_policy_candidates.wrapper_reason: A wrapper must decide whether preserving destination structure is preferable to the normal smart-merge path for the project.

native_policy_candidates.name: remove_duplicate_files_assignments
native_policy_candidates.description: Delete duplicate spec.files assignments after selecting the best surviving assignment.

native_policy_candidates.name: normalize_dependency_sections
native_policy_candidates.description: Prefer dependency source lines, remove development dependencies shadowed by runtime dependencies, and relocate runtime dependency blocks before the development-dependency note block.

native_policy_candidates.name: remove_singular_license_when_plural_present
native_policy_candidates.description: Delete spec.license when spec.licenses is present.

native_policy_candidates.name: rewrite_version_loader
native_policy_candidates.description: Rewrite spec.version and optional gem_version preamble based on min_ruby, entrypoint_require, and namespace.

native_policy_candidates.name: remove_self_dependency
native_policy_candidates.description: Delete dependency declarations whose first argument matches a supplied gem name.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: derive_replacement_values_from_project
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Native AST merge should not infer package identity, authors, email, homepage, or license policy from a project workspace.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: readme_gemspec_emoji_synchronization
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Synchronizing README H1 emoji with gemspec summary/description is a multi-file project policy, not a single-file AST merge primitive.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: dependency_ruby_floor_comment_alignment
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Aligning '# ruby >= ...' dependency comments requires resolver/package-index knowledge that is external to the AST content.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: bootstrap_fallback_for_malformed_gemspec
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Best-effort repair of empty or malformed files is setup orchestration resilience, not a deterministic AST contract.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: project_specific_preserve_destination_structure_decision
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Choosing to bypass template smart-merge for nonliteral spec.files assignments depends on project migration policy.

wrapper_required_behaviors.name: arbitrary_ruby_script_execution
wrapper_required_behaviors.reason: Language-specific executable recipe scripts are explicitly outside the shared API surface.

request.template_content:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name = "demo"
  spec.version = gem_version
  spec.summary = "🥘 "
  spec.files = Dir[
    "lib/**/*.rb",
    "sig/**/*.rbs"
  ]
  spec.add_dependency("json", ">= 2.0")
  spec.add_development_dependency("rspec", "~> 3.13")
end
request.destination_content:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name = "demo"
  spec.version = "0.1.0"
  spec.summary = "Real project summary"
  spec.license = "MIT"
  spec.licenses = ["MIT"]
  spec.files = Dir[
    "lib/**/*.rb",
    "exe/*"
  ]
  spec.add_development_dependency("json", ">= 2.0")
  spec.add_development_dependency("rspec", "~> 3.12")
end

structured_edit_request.content:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name = "demo"
  spec.version = "0.1.0"
  spec.summary = "Real project summary"
  spec.license = "MIT"
  spec.licenses = ["MIT"]
end
